bullets.text: Segmented cohorts by customer persona and workflow to identify advanced filter adoption as a behavioral driver of churn in China.
Built geo-based retention cohorts for US and China users to diagnose adoption differences and retention gaps.
Contributed to a +3% improvement in China D1 retention after advanced filtering UX changes.
Built regression models with PCA and achieved R² = 0.72.
Standardized and cleaned a 70K+ record dataset and documented assumptions for repeatable analysis.
Applied non-parametric tests and regression/PCA methods to evaluate rating drivers and potential bias.
Built a canonical account/entity mapping layer across CRM and billing systems to support reliable joins and funnel analysis.
Implemented scheduled ingestion from Stripe and HubSpot APIs into raw and staging layers with reproducible transforms.

rationale: Selected ach_rmp_r2 because it overlaps with the target role and is verified.
Selected ach_revops_entity_resolution because it overlaps with the target role and is verified.
Selected ach_rmp_data_prep because it overlaps with the target role and is verified.
summary: Data-focused analyst with experience in retention, churn, KPI modeling, revenue analytics, and statistical analysis across product and business datasets.
